name: dev-loop
description: Generic single-pass PRD + skillwiki dev cycle engine. v1.23.1: fixes Codex manifest version bumping, dependencies.yaml cache sync, and doctor-worker dependency probes for plugin-root skills/frontmatter-named agents. v1.23.0: Codex CLI/App compatibility — references/codex-tools.md maps worker Agent spawns to spawn_agent/wait_agent, documents the multi_agent config gate, and the detached-HEAD Codex App sandbox-finishing contract; .codex-plugin manifest brought into the version-bump set. v1.22.2: investigate/deep-research queue contracts are schema-adaptive — use proposed work items only when validation supports them, otherwise raw transcript captures. v1.22.0: /goal compatible mode — ORCHESTRATION_CAPS for goal-context detection, GRILL goal_override:never suppresses interviews under /goal, RETRO emits continuation hints, /goal Integration documents grill-me → /goal → dev-loop. v1.21.0: investigate mode adds proactive finding creation (`/dev-loop investigate`) from code/vault/transcript/deep-research sources with tiered queued output and vault-required gating. v1.20.0: compact-counter visibility — proactive 0-count emit, tuned thresholds {0-1 silent emit, 2 note, 3 warn, 4+ block}, HUD bridge writes ~/.claude/dev-loop/last-doctor.json for ccstatusline consumers. v1.19.0: release_policy.trigger_globs consumer in PUSH step — opt-in auto-bump on shippable commits, skip on vault/doc-only cycles. v1.18.1: vault-local wiki-presync skill discovery — probe and invoke before vault push. v1.18.0: peer-aware vault push gate — SAVE/MERGE acquire skillwiki advisory lockfile. v1.17.1: doctor-worker skillwiki bridge + research-worker stale buckets + wiki-sync dependency. v1.17.0: vault auto-commit gate + AUDIT dirty-tree check. v1.16.0: auto-archive originating raw transcripts via `closes:` frontmatter. v1.15.0: pluggable multi-backend code review. MERGE CI gate uses ci-health-worker. Execution subagents hard-wired to sonnet. /setup-dev-loop scaffolds 14 config sections (A-N).
